project.mission: Preserve upstream LLM throughput while decoupling telemetry and persistence from the critical request path.

performance_thesis.baseline_problem: Traditional gateways can degrade under high concurrency when telemetry and relational writes are coupled to the request path.
performance_thesis.public_claim_policy: Do not publish performance claims without reproducible benchmark artifacts.
performance_thesis.flat_vllm_definition: Gateway RPS >= 98% of direct vLLM in the same environment, P99 approximately flat, TTFT overhead documented.

invariants: No synchronous database write in the client response path.
Benchmarks compare direct upstream versus gateway.
Large payloads are not converted to strings unless required.
